data.change_summary: Addressed all 3 pending amendments. (1) Moved the is_terminal() guard to the top of safe_plan_hash_backfill (fs.rs:2593), before the match on snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation, so it applies to BOTH the Some(creation_hash) provenance branch and the None provenance branch. Previously only the None branch had the terminal guard, allowing the Some branch to incorrectly synthesize plan_hash on terminal entries with provenance. (2) Removed #[serde(deny_unknown_fields)] from both StartJournalDetails (model.rs) and CompletionJournalDetails (model.rs), making journal entries forward-compatible: an older binary can now parse and merge journal details written by a newer binary that adds fields, instead of falling through to duplicate event writes. Updated doc comments to document the forward-compatibility semantics. Replaced the generic json_fill_none helper in both merge functions with explicit field-by-field merge logic — each optional field (run_id, plan_hash for Start; run_id, plan_hash, outcome_detail for Completion) is enumerated individually. Removed the now-unused json_fill_none function and its dedicated test. (3) Removed the safe_plan_hash_backfill call from the terminal replay branch in update_task_run (fs.rs:3334), replacing it with an explanatory comment documenting the contract: terminal replays must preserve the caller-supplied plan_hash (including None) and never auto-populate from the snapshot. Added regression test terminal_replay_with_provenance_does_not_synthesize_plan_hash that preseeds a Succeeded entry with snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation=Some(hash) matching the current snapshot and plan_hash=None, replays with plan_hash=None, and asserts plan_hash stays None.
outstanding_risks: Pre-existing formatting drift in tests/unit/agent_execution_test.rs is unrelated to these changes but will appear in cargo fmt --check across the full workspace.
Pre-existing flaky checkpoint test (worktree_adapter_excludes_runtime_workspace_from_checkpoint_commits) intermittently fails due to environment issues — unrelated to these changes.

steps.description: Moved is_terminal() guard to the top of safe_plan_hash_backfill (fs.rs:2593), before the match on snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation. This ensures terminal entries are never auto-populated regardless of whether they have provenance (Some branch) or not (None branch). Previously only the None branch had the guard, leaving the Some branch unprotected.

Removed safe_plan_hash_backfill call from the terminal replay branch in update_task_run (fs.rs:3334), replacing with an explanatory comment documenting the contract: terminal replays must preserve the caller-supplied plan_hash and never auto-populate from the snapshot.

Added regression test terminal_replay_with_provenance_does_not_synthesize_plan_hash in service.rs:5360: preseeds a Succeeded entry with snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation=Some(hash) matching the current snapshot and plan_hash=None, replays terminal completion with plan_hash=None, asserts plan_hash stays None while outcome_detail is still backfilled.

Removed #[serde(deny_unknown_fields)] from StartJournalDetails and CompletionJournalDetails in model.rs. Updated doc comments to document forward-compatibility: unknown fields are silently ignored during deserialization so older binaries can parse and merge journal details written by newer binaries.

Replaced json_fill_none calls in StartJournalDetails::merge and CompletionJournalDetails::merge with explicit field-by-field merge: each optional field (run_id, plan_hash for Start; run_id, plan_hash, outcome_detail for Completion) is listed individually with if-None-then-fill logic. Comments note that adding a new optional field requires adding a merge line, and the round-trip test catches omissions.

Removed the now-unused json_fill_none<T> generic function and its doc comment from fs.rs. Also removed the json_fill_none_fills_absent_option_from_overlay test that directly tested the removed function.
Ran cargo test (1169 total: 357 lib + 128 integration + 1 doc + 683 unit, 0 failures), cargo clippy -- -D warnings (clean), cargo fmt --check on changed files (clean).

validation_evidence: cargo test: 1169 total tests passed (357 lib + 128 integration + 1 doc + 683 unit), 0 failed
cargo clippy -- -D warnings: no warnings or errors
cargo fmt --check: src/adapters/fs.rs, src/contexts/milestone_record/model.rs, src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs all clean

terminal_replay_with_provenance_does_not_synthesize_plan_hash: preseeds Succeeded entry with snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation=Some(hash) matching snapshot and plan_hash=None, replays with plan_hash=None → plan_hash stays None, outcome_detail backfilled to 'repair detail'
terminal_replay_legacy_row_without_plan_hash_stays_unset: existing test confirms terminal entries with None provenance are also NOT populated
terminal_replay_after_plan_evolution_succeeds: existing test confirms terminal replay with plan_hash=None does not conflict with stored hash_v1
running_entry_created_before_plan_adopts_snapshot_on_revisit: existing test confirms the None-provenance Running path still works — Running entries without provenance adopt the snapshot on revisit
safe_backfill_fills_plan_hash_when_snapshot_unchanged: existing test confirms the Some-provenance Running path still works for open entries
safe_backfill_skips_when_snapshot_evolved: existing test confirms evolved-plan safety check still works
journal_merge_fills_all_optional_fields: existing test verifies explicit field-by-field merge produces identical output to fully-populated render for both Start and Completion types
grep confirms deny_unknown_fields no longer appears in model.rs — forward-compatible deserialization is now active
grep confirms json_fill_none count is 0 in fs.rs — generic helper fully removed, replaced by explicit field-by-field merge
safe_plan_hash_backfill call sites: line 3005 (backfill_running_entry path) and line 3362 (non-terminal finalization path) remain; terminal replay path at line 3334 replaced with explanatory comment

All prior round tests continue to pass: named_terminal_replay_succeeds_with_multiple_attempts, terminal_runless_replay_rejected_when_started_at_mismatches, runless_match_rejected_when_started_at_mismatches, start_replay_after_plan_evolution_does_not_conflict, plan_hash_auto_populated_from_snapshot, explicit_plan_hash_takes_precedence_over_snapshot, runless_start_completed_with_named_run_id, completion_with_conflicting_plan_hash_rejects_runless_match, start_journal_details_round_trips_with_model_render, completion_journal_details_round_trips_with_model_render
